title: Spine typecheck gates for all corelib_tests entries
body:
Spine parity gates typecheck every `corelib_tests` entry before JIT/link stages; blocks analysis regressions on the full matrix catalog.

## What shipped

- [`corelib_tests_typecheck.rs`](compiler/crates/beskid_tests/src/spine/corelib_tests_typecheck.rs) covers all `corelib_tests` `.bd` entries (skip if file missing)
- Wired into `cargo test -p beskid_tests spine::` gate alongside link completeness

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`d03b7a9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/d03b7a9)
- **Completed:** 2026-06-07

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`
